title: stelis cocornaensis
intro: Stelis cocornaensis is a rare and unique orchid species, specifically a type of epiphytic orchid that grows on other plants or surfaces for support. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine due to its reported medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antibacterial properties. The health benefits of Stelis cocornaensis include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas or infusions by drying and grinding its flowers and roots, which can be used to treat various ailments.
